ddls:
CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or district the neighborhood belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the neighborhood */,
  "area_sq_mi" REAL /* Area of the neighborhood in square miles */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of residents in the neighborhood */,
  "median_house_value" REAL /* Median value of houses in the neighborhood */,
  "public_transport_access" INTEGER /* Accessibility to public transportation (e.g., number of bus stops, subway stations) */,
  "green_space_area" REAL /* Area of green spaces (parks, gardens) in the neighborhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "real_estate_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record of real estate data */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood associated with the data */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Crime rate in the neighborhood */,
  "average_rooms" REAL /* Average number of rooms per household */,
  "lower_status_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of residents classified as lower status */,
  "property_tax" INTEGER /* Average property tax amount */,
  "property_age" REAL /* Average age of properties in the neighborhood */,
  "zoning_area" INTEGER /* Zoning area designation */,
  "median_house_price" REAL /* Median price of houses in the neighborhood */,
  "vacancy_rate" REAL /* Percentage of vacant properties */,
  "building_quality_index" REAL /* Index indicating the overall quality of buildings */,
  "energy_efficiency_rating" REAL /* Average energy efficiency rating of properties */,
  "water_usage" REAL /* Average water usage per household */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_real_estate_data_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_types" (
  "property_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the property type (e.g., single-family, multi-family) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property type */,
  "average_square_footage" REAL /* Average square footage of properties of this type */,
  "average_price_sq_ft" REAL /* Average price per square foot for properties of this type */,
  "average_age" REAL /* Average age of properties of this type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_rates" (
  "tax_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax rate record */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood for which the tax rate applies */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Current property tax rate */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the tax rate was set */,
  "property_tax_exemption" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if there are any property tax exemptions */,
  "tax_incentives" TEXT /* Description of any tax incentives available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tax_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_rates_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zoning" (
  "zoning_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zoning record */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood with this zoning regulation */,
  "use_type" TEXT /* Type of use allowed (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  "regulations" TEXT /* Detailed zoning regulations for the neighborhood */,
  "maximum_building_height" INTEGER /* Maximum allowed building height in the zoning area */,
  "minimum_green_space_requirement" REAL /* Minimum required green space area for new developments */,
  "environmental_regulations" TEXT /* Detailed environmental regulations for the zoning area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zoning_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_zoning_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "urban_development_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each urban development project */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood where the project is located */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Expected end date of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated for the project */,
  "current_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., planning, construction, completed) */,
  "impact_assessment" TEXT /* Summary of the project's impact assessment */,
  "public_involvement" TEXT /* Level of public involvement in the project planning and execution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_urban_development_projects_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., city official, urban planner, public user) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Detailed access level (e.g., admin, read-only) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the real estate data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES real_estate_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "public_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the urban development project being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "anonymous" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the feedback is anonymous */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_public_feedback_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES urban_development_projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_public_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
